channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 0 com severidade Crítica
• 14 com severidade Alta
• 16 novas CVEs
• 1 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 NGINX Rift: CVE-2026-42945 Exploited in Attacks - The Cyber Express
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-42945 associada a Nginx. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 Grafana says missed GitHub token enabled repository breach following TanStack npm supply-chain attack - teiss
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Grafana
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Grafana, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 Grafana Labs Says Code Breach Stemmed from TanStack Attack - Infosecurity Magazine
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Grafana
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Grafana, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMigwFBVV95cUxOanNsQkFQZjdBa0VxT2k2MXZ5Wkt5ZEU5elQwZjltbXNiblRneEVlTlRDZXQzSFZvSjRtNWVNLWkyUmMzVEFBdl95RG5oOXRubW00cWdlSEp1WXFmaWJUc3dtVEZjbW8xcGdVYUFyeE82eDZ5ODEyeDk0Vk8yNU44Ql9wcw?oc=5
 
📰 New NGINX Vulnerability Allows Remote Attackers to Trigger Malicious Code - CyberSecurityNews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Nginx, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 New NGINX 0-Day RCE "nginx-poolslip" Affects Millions of NGINX Servers - CyberSecurityNews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Nginx, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 Microsoft Warns of Two Actively Exploited Defender Vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 7.8
Resumo:
Microsoft has disclosed that a privilege escalation and a denial-of-service flaw in Defender has come under active exploitation in the wild. The former, tracked as CVE-2026-41091, is rated 7.8 on the CVSS scoring system. Successful exploitation of the flaw could allow an attacker to gain SYSTEM privileges. "Improper link resolution before file access ('link following') in Microsoft Defender
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/microsoft-warns-of-two-actively.html
 
🚨 Highly Critical Drupal Core Flaw Exposes PostgreSQL Sites to RCE Attacks
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 6.5
Resumo:
Drupal has released security updates for a "highly critical" security vulnerability in Drupal Core that could be exploited by attackers to achieve remote code execution, privilege escalation, or information disclosure. The vulnerability, now tracked as CVE-2026-9082, carries a CVSS score of 6.5 out of 10.0, per CVE.org. Drupal said the vulnerability resides in a database abstraction API that is
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/highly-critical-drupal-core-flaw.html
 
🚨 9-Year-Old Linux Kernel Flaw Enables Root Command Execution on Major Distros
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 5.5
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a vulnerability in the Linux kernel that remained undetected for nine years. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-46333 (CVSS score: 5.5), is a case of improper privilege management that could permit an unprivileged local user to disclose sensitive files and execute arbitrary commands as root on default installations of several major
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/9-year-old-linux-kernel-flaw-enables.html
 
💣 Microsoft warns of new Defender zero-days exploited in attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
On Wednesday, Microsoft started rolling out security patches for two Defender vulnerabilities that have been exploited in zero-day attacks.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/microsoft-warns-of-new-defender-zero-days-exploited-in-attacks/
 
📰 Hackers bypass SonicWall VPN MFA due to incomplete patching
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Threat actors brute-forced VPN credentials and bypassed multi-factor authentication (MFA) on SonicWall Gen6 SSL-VPN appliances to deploy tools used in ransomware attacks.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/hackers-bypass-sonicwall-vpn-mfa-due-to-incomplete-patching/
 
📰 Police seize “First VPN” service used in ransomware, data theft attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A virtual private network service called 'First VPN,' used in ransomware and data theft attacks, has been taken offline in a joint international law enforcement operation.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/police-seize-first-vpn-service-used-in-ransomware-data-theft-attacks/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 USN-8202-3: jq regression
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 8.0
Resumo:
The update caused a regression for Ubuntu 18.04 LTS and Ubuntu 20.04 LTS. Original advisory details: It was discovered that jq did not correctly handle certain string concatenations. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of service or execute arbitrary code. This issue was addressed in Ubuntu 16.04 LTS, Ubuntu 18.04 LTS, Ubuntu 20.04 LTS, Ubuntu 22.04 LTS, Ubuntu 24.04 LTS and Ubuntu 25.10. (CVE...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8202-3
 
🚨 CVE-2026-42834 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.8
Resumo:
Improper link resolution before file access ('link following') in Azure Portal Windows Admin Center allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42834
 
🚨 CVE-2026-8073 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
The Kirki – Freeform Page Builder, Website Builder & Customizer plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to arbitrary file deletion due to insufficient file path validation and missing capability check in the 'downloadZIP' function in all versions up to, and including, 6.0.6. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to read and delete arbitrary files limited in the WordPress uploads base directory.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-8073
 
🚨 USN-8291-1: Linux kernel (Intel IoTG Real-time) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Several security issues were discovered in the Linux kernel. An attacker could possibly use these to compromise the system. This update corrects flaws in the following subsystems: - SMB network file system; - Netfilter; - io_uring subsystem; (CVE-2024-35862, CVE-2024-50060, CVE-2026-23274, CVE-2026-23351)
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8291-1
 
🚨 Microsoft provides mitigation for "YellowKey" BitLocker bypass flaw (CVE-2026-45585) - Help Net Security
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-45585 associada a Windows Server. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikwFBVV95cUxPcWxVRno2eG5zMFJMd1dHSEJTX2JBUGFkN05QWThvNExyQTl4LThZYjJKS1Y2bDA0MmpaVnB3dUw3ZTdIZEluY1RRUUJSTXZoTDhtVDE3WWFEOFozdUZXZ2ZuMWpzbm0wNlRLdFZwaFI2SEs3a2ZNOWNMMXlpdy1ZTzhqbHBCZlQ4WUxIZkRIaVhPZ1U?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 19/05/2026 até 21/05/2026.
